message:
fix(service): weighted load balancer tracks active_backend_count, bounds-checks backend operations

The Weighted load balancer used state.weights.len() as the backend
count, which could diverge from the actual number of live backends
when deferred weights were configured for future backends.

Fix: New active_backend_count field tracks the actual number of
live backends.  sync_backend_count() updates it alongside
current_weights.  select() and is_backend_healthy() bound their
operations to active_backend_count.  on_backend_inserted() uses
the bounded index.  LoadBalancer::empty() initializes
active_backend_count to 0.

Tests:
- lb_empty_preserves_weighted_configuration_for_future_backends:
  verifies empty balancer has no live SWRR state but preserves
  the weight configuration.
- lb_new_preserves_deferred_weight_for_later_backend_insert:
  verifies constructor reconciliation preserves deferred weights
  and that inserting a second backend activates the deferred weight.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
